Title: Snowpiercer
Actors: Daveed Diggs, Mickey Sumner, Alison Wright
Plot: Set seven years after the world has become a frozen wasteland, Snowpiercer centers on the remnants of humanity, who inhabit a gigantic, perpetually-moving train that circles the globe. Class warfare, social injustice and the politics of survival are questioned in this riveting television adaptation.
Awards: Nominated for 1 Primetime Emmy. 10 wins & 34 nominations total
